name: The Agent of Miracles - Jupiter
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>奇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>跡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>行</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ジュピター
desc: Once per turn: You can banish 1 "The Agent" monster from your GY, then target 1 LIGHT Fairy monster you control; that target gains 800 ATK until the end of this turn. Once per turn: You can discard 1 Fairy monster, then target 1 of your banished LIGHT Fairy monsters; Special Summon it. "The Sanctuary in the Sky" must be on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.
